name: Head-to-head
when_to_use: 需要让两个候选项像“赛前数据卡”一样逐项对决，并明确标出每一行谁占优时用它：适合两款产品、两个方案、两个供应商的最终比较。候选超过两个、需要分组查看更多列时用 comparison-table；只需要一句最终推荐而不需要逐行证据时用 verdict-summary。
why_valuable: 普通二维表很难在一眼内回答“这一项谁赢、总势头如何”；这个双栏对决把两位选手、逐项胜者、布尔/文本/评分语义和累计行胜数固定在同一视觉节奏里，又保留窄屏横向浏览。

data_in.note: data 是严格的两列比较矩阵：items 必须恰好两个，rows 按展示顺序提供指标。每个 row.values 应有两个值并按 items 顺序对应；row.winner 用 0/1 标出该行胜者，'tie' 表示平手，不填则不强调。kind 默认 text；bool 接受 true、false、'partial'；rating 接受 0–5。顶层 winner 可指定总冠军，不填时按各行 winner 的 0/1 计数推导。

schema.title?: string —— 对决标题；省略时显示 “Head-to-head”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 标题下的一行背景或比较口径
schema.versusLabel?: string —— 两列之间的短标签；省略时为 “VS”
schema.items: {name:string,note?:string}[] —— 恰好两个候选项；name 为名称，note 为一行定位说明
schema.rows: {label:string,group?:string,note?:string,kind?:'text'|'bool'|'rating',values:[string|number|boolean|'partial'|null,string|number|boolean|'partial'|null],winner?:0|1|'tie'}[] —— 指标行；相邻同名 group 形成分组，winner 决定逐行高亮
schema.winner?: 0|1|'tie' —— 总冠军；不填时由 rows 中 winner=0/1 的行胜数推导

_cellSemantics.bool: true → 绿色 ✓；false → 红色 ✗；'partial' → 琥珀色 Partial；其他值 → —
_cellSemantics.text: string 或 number → 原样文本；null、undefined 或空字符串 → —
_cellSemantics.rating: number 0–5 → ★ + 分数；越界值夹到 0–5；非数字 → —

spec.note: 按内容增高；主体至少 680px 宽，窄载体在组件内部横向滚动以保持两侧对称。无 vh/百分比高度，不读取载体尺寸。

en.when_to_use: Use it when two candidates should compete metric by metric like a pre-game stats card, with each row's winner clearly marked. It suits final comparisons between two products, proposals, or vendors. For more than two candidates or grouped access to more columns, use comparison-table; when you only need a final recommendation without row-level evidence, use verdict-summary.
en.why_valuable: An ordinary two-dimensional table does not quickly answer "who wins this metric, and what is the overall momentum?" This two-column matchup keeps both contenders, row winners, boolean/text/rating semantics, and cumulative row-win counts in one visual rhythm while preserving horizontal browsing on narrow screens.

data_in.note: data is a strict two-column comparison matrix: items must contain exactly two entries, and rows supplies metrics in display order. Each row.values should contain two values matching item order. row.winner marks the row winner with 0/1, 'tie' means tied, and omission adds no emphasis. kind defaults to text; bool accepts true, false, or 'partial'; rating accepts 0-5. A top-level winner may set the overall champion; when omitted, it is inferred by counting row winners of 0/1.

schema.title?: string -- matchup title; displays "Head-to-head" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- one-line context or comparison basis below the title
schema.versusLabel?: string -- short label between the columns; defaults to "VS"
schema.items: {name:string,note?:string}[] -- exactly two candidates; name is the candidate name and note is a one-line positioning statement
schema.rows: {label:string,group?:string,note?:string,kind?:'text'|'bool'|'rating',values:[string|number|boolean|'partial'|null,string|number|boolean|'partial'|null],winner?:0|1|'tie'}[] -- metric rows; adjacent identical group values form a group, and winner controls row highlighting
schema.winner?: 0|1|'tie' -- overall champion; when omitted, inferred from the number of rows with winner=0/1

_cellSemantics.bool: true -> green checkmark; false -> red cross; 'partial' -> amber Partial; other values -> em dash
_cellSemantics.text: string or number -> text as given; null, undefined, or empty string -> em dash
_cellSemantics.rating: number 0-5 -> star + score; out-of-range values are clamped to 0-5; non-number -> em dash

spec.note: Height grows with content. The body is at least 680px wide; narrow carriers scroll horizontally inside the component to preserve two-sided symmetry. No vh or percentage heights, and carrier dimensions are not read.

example._why: 用两款知名降噪耳机展示两列头牌、5 个真实决策维度、逐行胜者、平手和布尔能力，能完整覆盖对决语义。

minimal.title: Noise-cancelling showdown
minimal.subtitle: Flagship over-ear headphones · street prices and published battery estimates

items.name: Sony WH-1000XM5
items.note: Long battery life with deep app controls

uplink: display-only，无 uplink；组件不派发宿主或全局事件，所有悬停反馈都只发生在自有 shadow root 内。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
